urdu transliteration text: ABBAS (ASWS) Tera Haq Hai Zamana Tujhe Roye.....
english translation text: O Abbas, it is your right that the world cries for you

urdu transliteration text:
Jub Shaam O Saher FATEMA ZEHRA (SAWS) Tujhe Roye.....
When Fatima Zahra (SA) cries over you day and night
Durra Liye Pehre Pe sitamgar (LA) Khada HaiKaise Tere Lashe Pe SAKINA (SAWS) Tujhe Roye
english translation text: The oppressor is watching vigilantly with a whip in his hands, How can Sakina cry on your dead body?

urdu transliteration text: Jis Waqt Uthaya Na Gaya Lasha Jawan KaSHEH (ASWS) Us Ghadi AKBAR (ASWS) Se Ziyada Tujhe Roye
english translation text: When Imam Hussain (AS) was unable to lift the dead body of his young son, At that moment, he cried more for you than for Ali Akbar

urdu transliteration text: ZAINAB (SAWS) Ne Kaha Shaam E Gariba Mein Aaye Ghazi, Be Parda Mujhe Dekh Ke Baba Tujhe Roye
english translation text: Zainab said that the warrior came on Shame Gharibaan, Seeing me without a veil, my father cried for you

urdu transliteration text: Sajde Ke Liye Jub Liye Hatho Ka SaharaTo SAJJAD (ASWS)  Musalle Pe Humehsa Tujhe Roye
english translation text: When Sajjad (AS) would take the support of his hands to perform prostrations, Then on the prayer mat, Sajjad (AS) would always cry for you

urdu transliteration text: Bin Hath Ke Kis Tarha Tu Ghode Se Gira ThaYeh Sun Ke Bahut Ahle Medina Tujhe Roye
english translation text:
Alas, how did you fall from the horse without your arms?
Listening to this tragedy, the people of Madina cried for you

urdu transliteration text: Mashkiza Kahin Jism Kahin Hath Kahin HaiJaa Jaa Ke Kahan FATEMA ZEHRA (SAWS) Tujhe Roye
english translation text: The water bag, your body, your arms are all dispersed. At which spot should Fatima Zahra (SA) cry for you?

urdu transliteration text: Aarman SAKINA (SAWS) Ka Tha Jitna Tujhe Roti, SAJJAD (ASWS) Teri Qabar Pe Utna Tujhe Roye
english translation text: As much as Sakina wished to cry for you, Sajjad (AS) cried that much for you on your grave

urdu transliteration text: Hashim Ke Qamar Kyun Na Tera Chahne Wala, Wash Shams Ka Padh Te Hue Sura Tujhe Roye
english translation text: O Hashim and Qamar (Poet), why should not your lover, Cry for you while reciting the Surah of Wa Shams?
